children.heading: Section 5007
children.label: a Section 5007
children.text: Any provision of may be varied by agreement of the banks involved.section 5007 of this title

children.heading: No other provisions may be varied
children.label: b No other provisions may be varied
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (a), no provision of this chapter may be varied by agreement of any person or persons.
